title: THE $1 CODER: This CODER COSTS $1 AND GIVES YOU $50 WORTH USAGE!
summary: Command Code is a coding agent harness optimized for open-source models like DeepSeek, Qwen, and others. It improves agent performance through routing, caching, context handling, and tool-call repair. The platform offers affordable pricing starting at one dollar per month with evaluation claims that DeepSeek V4 Pro outperforms Opus 4.7 on hard tool-heavy tasks.
writeup: The video covers Command Code, a coding agent harness tuned for open-source models including DeepSeek, Qwen, and GLM. It walks through the harness features: model routing, prompt and context caching, context handling, and tool-call repair. The cost angle is the hook: a Go plan priced at $1 per month that includes credits for running real coding tasks. The takeaway is that the harness aims to stretch open-source model usage further per dollar through routing and caching.
